html:
Exclusive to:

BrightsmithyBrightsmithy Kit

The Brightsmithy is a Crafting Station exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in From Beyond. The Brightsmithy Kit used to place a Brightsmithy can be crafted while next to one of the fully assembled Lunar Altars. It requires with 5 Moon Rocks, 5 Moon Shards and 1 Pure Brilliance to craft.

The Brightsmithy grants access to the Brightsmithy Filter while the player stands next to it. Items crafted at the Brightsmithy cannot be prototyped except for Walter's Survivor Items which can be.

Crafting Recipes

  • Brightshade Armor
  • Brightshade Helm
  • Brightshade Bomb
  • Brightshade Staff
  • Brightshade Sword
  • Brightshade Smasher
  • Brightshade Shoevel
  • Brightshade Repair Kit
  • Polar Bearger Bin
  • Ice Crystaleyezer Kit
  • Howlitzer
  • Brightshade Husk Rounds
  • Pure Brilliance Rounds

Trivia

  • The Brighstmithy was introduced in the Taking Root update.
  • Wortox's examination quote is a reference to the belief in folklore that cold iron repels or harms supernatural creatures, as he is an imp.

Assets

  • Open Idle
  • Used

BrightsmithyBrightsmithy Kit
“Just the place to make something very clever and scientific.”
–Wilson, when examining a built Brightsmithy
“What gives? That little fire doesn't even feel warm!”
–Willow, when examining a built Brightsmithy
“Is there a mighty hammer for Wolfgang to swing?”
–Wolfgang, when examining a built Brightsmithy
“Will I be able to create anything of use?”
–Wendy, when examining a built Brightsmithy
“GREETINGS, COUSIN”
–WX-78, when examining a built Brightsmithy
“It utilizes crystallized energy to reshape and reinforce organic material.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a built Brightsmithy
“How aboot we get this furnace going, eh Luce?”
–Woodie, when examining a built Brightsmithy
“To work, then.”
–Maxwell, when examining a built Brightsmithy
“I shall forge weapons to rival the gods themselves!”
–Wigfrid, when examining a built Brightsmithy
“Can we use it to make crafts?”
–Webber, when examining a built Brightsmithy
“What shall I cook up with this?”
–Warly, when examining a built Brightsmithy
“Make shiny things!”
–Wormwood, when examining a built Brightsmithy
“It's givin' me some bright ideas.”
–Winona, when examining a built Brightsmithy
“There isn't any iron in that forge, is there?”
–Wortox, when examining a built Brightsmithy
“Make shiny things.”
–Wurt, when examining a built Brightsmithy
“Let's make something, Woby!”
–Walter, when examining a built Brightsmithy
“Why waste time staring at it when I could be making something?”
–Wanda, when examining a built Brightsmithy
“A simple combination of elements!”
–Wilson, when examining a Brightsmithy Kit
“Right. Now I guess I have to build it.”
–Willow, when examining a Brightsmithy Kit
“Wolfgang will find good spot for it!”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Brightsmithy Kit
“I should try to put these scattered pieces together...”
–Wendy, when examining a Brightsmithy Kit
“ASSEMBLY REQUIRED”
–WX-78, when examining a Brightsmithy Kit
“It should be a simple matter to construct it.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Brightsmithy Kit
“Still needs some setting up.”
–Woodie, when examining a Brightsmithy Kit
“There's more to be done.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Brightsmithy Kit
“The förge must be built, förthwith!”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Brightsmithy Kit
“We can build it, we have lots of free hands to spare!”
–Webber, when examining a Brightsmithy Kit
“I'll whip it up tout de suite!”
–Warly, when examining a Brightsmithy Kit
“Where to plant it?”
–Wormwood, when examining a Brightsmithy Kit
“Let's get this thing up and running!”
–Winona, when examining a Brightsmithy Kit
“Shall we forge ahead?”
–Wortox, when examining a Brightsmithy Kit
“Look easy to build, florp.”
–Wurt, when examining a Brightsmithy Kit
“Woby and I can have that set up in a jiffy!”
–Walter, when examining a Brightsmithy Kit
“Well, it's not going to build itself.”
–Wanda, when examining a Brightsmithy Kit
The Brightsmithy is a Crafting Station exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in From Beyond. The Brightsmithy Kit used to place a Brightsmithy can be crafted while next to one of the fully assembled Lunar Altars. It requires with 5 Moon Rocks, 5 Moon Shards and 1 Pure Brilliance to craft.
The Brightsmithy grants access to the Brightsmithy Filter while the player stands next to it. Items crafted at the Brightsmithy cannot be prototyped except for Walter's Survivor Items which can be.

Brightshade Armor
Brightshade Helm
Brightshade Bomb
Brightshade Staff

Brightshade Smasher

Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Brighstmithy was introduced in the Taking Root update.
Wortox's examination quote is a reference to the belief in folklore that cold iron repels or harms supernatural creatures, as he is an imp.

The '''Brightsmithy''' is a [[Crafting|Crafting Station]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[From Beyond]]''. The '''Brightsmithy Kit''' used to place a Brightsmithy can be crafted while next to one of the fully assembled [[Lunar Altars]]. It requires with 5 [[Moon Rock]]s, 5 [[Moon Shard]]s and 1 [[Pure Brilliance]] to craft.

The Brightsmithy grants access to the [[Brightsmithy Filter]] while the player stands next to it. Items crafted at the Brightsmithy cannot be prototyped except for [[Walter]]'s Survivor Items which ''can'' be.

== Crafting Recipes ==
{{#lst:Brightsmithy Filter|Craftable Items}}

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Brighstmithy was introduced in the ''[[From Beyond#Taking Root|Taking Root]]'' update.
* Wortox's examination quote is a reference to the belief in folklore that cold iron repels or harms supernatural creatures, as he is an imp.
